creator: henrik@brixandersen.dk
text:
Sorry for not getting back to you earlier.

I have just tried to reproduce this issue on various versions of
FreeBSD, seems this fix is only needed on FreeBSD 4 where fetch(1)
appearently doesn't use a temporary file for downloading as we
discussed on IRC a while back. I somehow missed that initially.

To clarify: this is a non-issue on FreeBSD 6.x. Feel free to close
this PR as you see fit.

-- 
Henrik Brix Andersen <henrik@brixandersen.dk>
